title: polystichum discretum
intro: Polystichum discretum, also known as the Chinese leather fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Polystichum discretum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Polystichum discretum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the dried fronds in hot water.
